sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52375" key="kakote/rmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-τέρμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n52375.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ending ill</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with difficulty</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψυγμός</foreign> Poet.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">de Herb.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
